untranslatable_reason: Pattern recognition (AEDT/Ascending Envelope Double Top) cannot be expressed with standard technical indicators. Requires explicit candle pattern detection logic. Secondary validation (industry peer weakness check) also not available in indicator set. Used trend-following proxy with ADX and moving average crossover as substitute.
translation_notes: Signal requires visual pattern detection which is not expressible through the available indicator set. Substituted with: (1) ADX > 25 to confirm strong trend, (2) Price vs SMA_50 to determine market direction (bull/bear), (3) Pivot levels (S1/R1) as support/resistance proxies for entry/exit. Stop loss set to 2.0% as conservative estimate. Author-silent parameters (success rates, target prices, volume trends) cannot be translated.
